dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Financial overview and important notices in one place.

notices.title: System Notices
notices.subtitle: Insights and alerts generated from your financial activity.
notices.empty: No alerts for the current period.

wallets.title: Wallet Snapshot
wallets.subtitle: Highlighted wallet balances for the current period.

codes.EXPENSE_INCREASE: Expenses increased by {{value}}{{unit}} compared to previous period.
codes.EXPENSE_DECREASE: Expenses decreased by {{value}}{{unit}} compared to previous period.
codes.INCOME_INCREASE: Income increased by {{value}}{{unit}} compared to previous period.
codes.INCOME_DECREASE: Income decreased by {{value}}{{unit}} compared to previous period.
codes.NEGATIVE_BALANCE: Your balance is negative. Please review your spending plan.
codes.LOW_BALANCE: Your balance is low. Consider adding reserve funds.
codes.CATEGORY_OVER_SPENDING: A category is exceeding its normal spending range.
codes.CATEGORY_DOMINANT: One category is dominating your current spending.
codes.DEFAULT: There is a new financial update for the current period.

ai.title: AI Chat Demo
